name: webflow-agent-skills
description: Ship solutions for and with Webflow. This plugin provides a collection of skills to help you integrate and automate tasks related to Webflow, including webhook management, designer api tasks, and more.

skills.name: webflow-browser-api
skills.description: Control Webflow Analyze and Optimize from JavaScript via the Browser API. Use when managing tracking consent, integrating CMPs (OneTrust, TrustArc), tracking experiment variations, setting custom visitor attributes, or personalizing user experiences.

skills.name: webflow-code-components
skills.description: Build, define, and import React code components into Webflow via DevLink. Use when creating Webflow code components, configuring declareComponent definitions, working with prop types, styling within Shadow DOM, bundling with Webpack, or troubleshooting DevLink imports.

skills.name: webflow-designer-api
skills.description: Work with the Webflow Designer API — either by building Designer Extensions (iframes inside the Webflow Designer) or by generating code snippets for the Designer API Playground. Covers element manipulation, styles, components, pages, variables, assets, error handling, CLI usage, and UI design patterns. Use when creating, debugging, or modifying Designer Extensions, OR when the user wants to run Designer API code in the Playground app.

skills.name: webflow-webhooks
skills.description: Receive and verify Webflow webhooks. Use when setting up Webflow webhook handlers, debugging signature verification, or handling Webflow events like form_submission, site_publish, ecomm_new_order, or collection item changes.
